debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I J : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
h_J_le_I : I ≤ J
h_I_le_J : J ≤ I
h_final_left : ∀ N ∈ J, N ∈ I
⊢ ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
intro N h_N_in_I
      let N' : I := ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩
      have h_A : ∃ A : J, N ≤ A.val := RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I N'
      rcases h_A with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_I_le_J
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ f h_N_in_I := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux := J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop (hf h_N_in_I) h_A_not_mem
        have h_last : sSup (f h_N_in_I) = ⊥ := Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux.symm (hf' h_N_in_I ▸ h_N_le_A)
        exact I.not_bot_mem (hf' h_N_in_I ▸ h_last ▸ h_N_in_I)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := hf' h_N_in_I ▸ le_sSup h_mem
      exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A) ▸ A.prop
    ext; exact ⟨h_final_right, h_final_left⟩
